picks.name: Cummins Inc.
picks.thesis: CMI is down 10% from its 52-week high while earnings grew 10%/yr — a sentiment-driven pullback, not fundamental deterioration. Quality looks intact (healthy margins, durable revenue, long-term uptrend), and it's now at or below fair value ($663.03 vs $848.17, low confidence). Valued with DCF and Comps.
